title: YouTuber Danny Go’s son Isaac Coleman’s cause of death: Inside the 14-year-old’s battle with rare illness
summary_full: YouTuber Danny Go, whose real name is Daniel Coleman, announced the death of his 14-year-old son Isaac Coleman on May 21, 2026. Isaac had Fanconi anemia, a rare genetic disorder, and was later diagnosed with mouth cancer in 2025. In an emotional tribute, Danny praised his son’s strength, joy, and resilience through years of health struggles. Fans and fellow creators flooded social media with condolences and support for the grieving family.
